description: If comfort is on your mind, the Arnold sandals from skechers transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish and super comfy, this pair is ruggedly crafted for casual wear. Team it with jeans or shorts and step out in style.Upper Leather upper for rugged feel and style Over-the-foot straps for added comfort Back strap to hold the foot firmly in place Contrast thread detailing for added structure and style Brand tab appliqued on the front Midsole EVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impact Well cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for soft touch and protection from blisters Outsole Rubber outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves for ease of movement Lugs in the forefoot and heel region for better traction shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
